titleStmt.title: SII 42.282: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 282. (A.R. No. 50 of 1956-57.) Giddalūru, Cumbum Taluk, Kurnool District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar in the mukha-maṇḍapa of the Pāṭaḷa-Nāgēśvara temple.
Dated Śaka • • • ., Plava, Āśvija, śu. 10, in characters of the 15th century A.D. (Space for Śaka year left blank).
Registers a gift of land by the Reḍḍis and Karaṇams of Gṛiddalūru to Kāśe Honnūrappa of Guḍipāḍu for his having built the temple and installed the image therein.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayā
bhyudaya śālivāha
na śakavarṣaṁbulu Place left blank,
Agunēṭi plava nāma saṁvatsara
Āśvīja śu 10 lu guḍipāṭi
kāśa(śe) hōṁnūrappaku kasuva(vā)
griddalūru Adhikāri reḍḍi karaṇā
lu kuṁccāla raṁgaśāyi
veṁkaṭa rāmaṁna
reḍlu dappiri koṁ
ḍāreḍi lōṁttā
pirāreḍi vagē(gai)rā
vrāyiṁcci yi
ccina bhūdāna dha
rma śāsanakrama
meṭlaṁnnanu
[Ī] grāmamu
lōnu śrīsvāmi dēvālaya
ṁkaṭṭi pratiṣpa(ṣṭa) cēśi(si)naṁdku kasu
vā griddalūru polaṁlōnu
saruvappakuṁṭaku dakṣa(kṣi)ṇaṁ cēnu
É0 ® paṁḍeḍu muṁttalu koṁgga
lavīṭi polaṁlōnu yēṭi paśca(ści)
maṁ cēnu É0 . kuṁcca(ce)ḍu vubha
yaṁ tūmeḍu cēnu śrīsvā
miki prītigānu yistimi [.] ga
nuka mī putra pautra pā
raṁparyaṁttaṁ Ācaṁdrārka
sthāyigānu Anubhaviṁccusu (Anubhaviṁcēdi)
Digital edition of SII 42.282 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
